channel.title: Cordova on SPERIXLABS
channel.description: Recent content in Cordova on SPERIXLABS

item.title: Obscurity is not Security: A Security Analysis of MyVodafone (Ghana) Application
item.description: This research presents a security analysis on a cross-platform application. The My Vodafone (Ghana) application formed the basis for the analysis; detailing both static and dynamic analysis. Technical Details
